summary_en: 160,000 ordinary shares (1.92% of shares outstanding) to be cancelled effective 29 May 2026 under Companies Act Article 178. Post-cancellation issued shares: 8,140,000.
title_en: Notice Concerning Cancellation of Treasury Shares (Cancellation of Treasury Shares under Companies Act Article 178)
translation_en_brief: NCD Co., Ltd. announced on 15 May 2026 that its Board of Directors resolved to cancel 160,000 treasury shares (1.92% of issued shares outstanding) effective 29 May 2026 pursuant to Article 178 of the Companies Act. The cancellation will reduce issued shares from 8,300,000 to 8,140,000 shares and treasury shares from 279,884 to 119,884 shares.
